articles.title: Global Stocks Surge Amid Mixed US Performance and AI Setback
articles.description: Global stocks rose with diverse movements in the US as AI momentum slowed. Notable declines were seen in Broadcom, impacting semiconductor stocks. Despite efforts for a ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, oil prices fell. Meanwhile, fluctuations were observed in currency and gold markets.

articles.title: Trading Day: Who needs tech?
articles.description: Investors on Thursday latched onto the more encouraging aspects of mixed signals surrounding an end to war in the Middle East, pushing stocks higher and oil prices lower. Worries over AI weighed on tech, but other sectors did the heavy lifting, as attention now turns to U.S. employment data on Friday.

articles.title: Trump Alone Can Fix Gas Prices-But Not Likely This Summer
articles.description: For many Americans, summer getaways will be shorter in length and closer to home—as higher gas prices keep them from costlier vacations.

articles.title: Treasuries rise as oil signals optimism on Iran peace accord
articles.description: The moves in US government debt pushed yields lower on Thursday by two to four basis points across maturities as oil prices declined.
